title: Dot Product — Projection & Angle
description: Derives and demystifies the dot product as both a projection operator and a cosine calculator, with applications in diffuse lighting (Lambertian term), frustum plane tests, and back-face culling. This is arguably the single most-used mathematical operation in real-time rendering, appearing in every shading model and many culling algorithms. Students will implement a Lambert diffuse shader, a view-direction dot product for Fresnel, and a plane-point distance test from memory.
